items.title: Telles: Card Spotlight
items.description: Check out this reveal video for Ace Navigator Telles, coming to Foundry in patch 0.8.0. Any poker fans out there?

items.title: New Hero: Darling
items.description: Darling slips through the battlefield wearing stolen identities, turning every Hero into a new mask. On Reveal, she can become any Hero on the board while keeping her Influence.

items.title: New Show Match!
items.description: Provost Thale and Brother Corbin go head-to-head in this tournament style show match, highlighting the Intuits and Scholar Factions.

items.title: DevBlog: Foundry 2.0
items.description: Explaining the major swap of Relics to Schematics in 0.8.0. And a hint about what's next!

items.title: The (Last) Empress Mini-Cinematic
items.description: Learn the lore behind The (Last) Empress, a Visionary from the Foundry Core Set

items.title: New Hero: Timeless Chronicler
items.description: The Timeless Chronicler refuses to let history end. With every Pulse she gathers Knowledge, and her Reveal calls the Final Orrery into the Ruins—offering the power to extend the game into Round 4.
